results.rendered_html:
apārtha [apa-artha], apārthaka a.
1 Useless, unprofitable, worthless; sarvametadapārthaṃ te kṣipraṃ tau saṃprasādaya  Mb. 
2 Meaningless, unmeaning, senseless; apārthaṃ bahu bhāṣate  Suśr. 
— rthaṃ Senseless or incoherent talk or argument (regarded as one of the faults of composition in rhetoric); yogyatāsattyākāṃkṣāśūnyaṃ vākyaṃ  Gautama ; paurvāparyāyogādapratibaṃdhārthamapārthakaṃ; cf. also  Kāv. 3. 128 ; samudāyārthaśūnyaṃ yattadapārthamitīṣyate .
Comp.
— karaṇaṃ advancing a false plea in a law-suit.
